fvg_detection.note: FVGs detected with lifecycle tracking (5min disabled — too noisy). status: active (unfilled), partially_filled (price entered gap), filled (fully mitigated). NDOG = New Day Opening Gap (prior close → current open). NWOG = New Week Opening Gap (Friday close → Sunday/Monday open).
